scripts.all-commit: git add . && git commit -m 'prueba' && git push
scripts.all-deploy-dev: npm run build && npm run compile-mta && npm run deploy-mta
scripts.all-deploy-m: npm run build && npm run compile-mta && npm run deploy-mta-module-app
scripts.all-deploy-m2: npm run compile-mta && npm run deploy-mta-module-app
scripts.all-deploy-qas: npm run build && npm run compile-mta && cf deploy ./mta_archives/archive.mtar -e mtaext-qas.yaml
scripts.all-deploy-prd: npm run build && npm run compile-mta && cf deploy ./mta_archives/archive.mtar -e mtaext-prd.yaml
